action: Convert the hidden-code possibility in copied raw chats into a privacy-preserving, falsifiable hypothesis register.
required_evidence: separate literal, structural, and emergent hypotheses

progress.source_scope: public repository operating state plus abstract File Library evidence; no raw private text committed
progress.result: The possibility of a hidden code is preserved as three falsifiable hypotheses rather than asserted as fact or dismissed without testing.

handoff: Implement a local-only archive analyzer that freezes candidate rules before held-out evaluation, compares against shuffled and matched null corpora, and emits only aggregate redacted evidence.
